overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a dystopian urban street during an orange-hued dust storm at night. The player navigates past pedestrians, palm trees, and towering holographic advertisements before crossing a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction barriers alongside building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to construction barriers, passing pedestrians on the right

notable_agents.action: person leaning against wall looking at phone

entered.detail: yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the left side of the walkway
tall metal pole with street lighting fixtures
dark building facade with large white asian characters reading 虎豹樂
modern dual-headed street lamp illuminating the hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow city sidewalk bordered by construction barriers on the left and a building with prominent Asian signage on the right. The atmosphere is thick with orange haze from a dust storm, with street lamps cutting through the gloom. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and seating

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into open plaza area with palm trees and benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing pedestrians and people seated on benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the plaza
large floating holographic advertisement showing a muscular figure with text ITS BIG
concrete seating areas with people resting
tall modern building with illuminated glass facade rising into the haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza lined with palm trees and benches. A massive holographic advertisement floats in the distance above the haze. Pedestrians stroll and sit on benches while the player walks past, with towering glass skyscrapers visible through the orange gloom.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at skyscrapers and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering buildings and overhead infrastructure, then returning gaze to street level

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light at the approaching intersection
painted markings indicating pedestrian crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an intersection while the camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows piercing through the orange haze. The holographic advertisement shifts to the left as the player moves forward. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings become visible as pedestrians gather at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with vehicle traffic

events.description: group of pedestrians begins crossing the street as vehicles wait and pass through intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sports car driving through the intersection
orange utility vehicle with headlights on approaching the crosswalk

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
futuristic cars and trucks driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player enters the crosswalk and crosses the wide intersection alongside a group of pedestrians. Futuristic vehicles including a white sports car and an orange utility truck navigate the crossing. The yellow striped crosswalk markings dominate the foreground while the traffic light shifts closer on the left. The orange haze continues to obscure the distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city street that transitions from a narrow, enclosed corridor into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins on a cramped sidewalk bordered by construction barriers and Asian signage, where street lamps struggle to pierce a thick, orange dust storm. As the path opens, the camera moves into a spacious pedestrian plaza lined with palm trees and benches, revealing towering glass skyscrapers and a massive holographic advertisement floating in the haze. The scene then shifts as the camera tilts upward to capture the illuminated peaks of the surrounding towers before descending toward a crowded street corner. Finally, the movement carries the viewer across a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians, passing futuristic sports cars and utility trucks under the persistent orange gloom.
